# State Politics Tracker

> Public-interest dashboard tracking money and polling in 2026 statewide races across the country. Campaign-finance filings sourced from each state's disclosure agency via the state-level-campaign-finance pipeline, plus aggregated public polling.

Texas and California are tracked on separate Political Integrity Project sites; the Texas Governor's race lives at https://texaspoliticstracker.com.

## Pages

- [All states](/): Pick a state — dashboards live per state, with pipeline status for the rest.
- Per-state pages (once live): /{state}/candidates, /{state}/polling, /{state}/money/donors, /{state}/money/outside-spending, /{state}/about.
